class.name: C3Http.RequestError
class.brief_description: Structured error placed on [member C3Http.Response.error] when [member C3Http.Response.ok] is [code]false[/code].

method.name: transport
method.description: Builds an error for a transport-level failure with no usable HTTP response.

method.name: timed_out
method.description: Builds an error for a request that received no response before the timeout.

method.name: client_error
method.description: Builds an error for a request rejected before being sent.

method.name: cancelled
method.description: Builds an error for a caller-initiated cancellation.

method.name: body_size_limit_exceeded
method.description: Builds an error for a response body that exceeded [member C3Http.Options.body_size_limit].

members.member: Broad category of failure. One of the [enum C3Http.RequestError.Kind] values.
HTTP status code, or [code]0[/code] when not applicable.

constants.constant: No usable HTTP response (DNS, TLS, connection, or request-start failure).
The request was rejected before being sent (e.g. an invalid argument).
No response was received before the timeout elapsed.
